motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Control feedback and navigation state changes.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single dominant action in a workspace.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.52 0.11 110); color: white; padding: 10px 16px; border: 0; border-radius: 6px; font: 600 15px/1.4 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.46 0.11 110); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.44 0.10 245); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: oklch(0.41 0.10 110); }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: A persistent, labeled catalog search field.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 6px; color: oklch(0.22 0.018 110); font: 560 13px/1.35 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input { background: white; color: oklch(0.22 0.018 110); padding: 10px 12px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.008 110); border-radius: 6px; font: 400 15px/1.5 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.44 0.10 245); outline-offset: 1px; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: oklch(0.97 0.006 110); color: oklch(0.22 0.018 110); border: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.008 110); border-radius: 999px; padding: 5px 9px; font: 560 13px/1.2 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Workspace Navigation
components.description: A quiet navigation list with an explicit current item.
components.html: 素材库决策记录
components.css: .ds-nav { display: grid; gap: 4px; width: 190px; background: oklch(0.97 0.006 110); padding: 8px; border-radius: 10px; } .ds-nav-item { color: oklch(0.22 0.018 110); padding: 9px 10px; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; font: 560 14px/1.4 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(0.94 0.018 110); } .ds-nav-item:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.44 0.10 245); outline-offset: 1px; } .ds-nav-item.is-active { background: oklch(0.91 0.04 110); color: oklch(0.28 0.07 110); }

components.name: Decision Trace
components.description: An ordered, textual explanation of a recommendation decision.
components.html:
1. 场景识别joy · 0.86
  2. 策略通过自动发送阈值
components.css: .ds-trace { display: grid; gap: 0; margin: 0; padding: 0; list-style-position: inside; color: oklch(0.22 0.018 110); font: 400 14px/1.5 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-trace li { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; padding: 10px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.008 110); } .ds-trace span { color: oklch(0.46 0.016 110); }

narrative.overview: 运营人员在清晰、安静的工作台里逐项审核将进入真实聊天的素材。表情预览负责趣味，产品外壳通过稳定结构和可核对原因建立信任。
keyCharacteristics: 白色工作画布与低色度橄榄主色
表格优先、抽屉补充、状态就地解释
素材预览有表现力，控制面板保持节制
完整键盘焦点与所有异步状态

rules.name: The Sparse Accent Rule
rules.body: 主色只用于可操作或已选中的元素。

rules.name: The Task Scale Rule
rules.body: 管理端使用固定 rem 字号，禁止营销式流体大标题。

dos: Do 让表格、筛选和详情抽屉形成主要工作流。
Do 为 loading、empty、error、disabled 和 partial success 写完整状态。
Do 让审核和安全状态同时具备文字、图标和颜色。
donts: Don't 做成娱乐化大屏、充满装饰卡片的通用 SaaS 模板。
Don't 使用霓虹渐变、玻璃拟态、嵌套卡片或装饰性网格背景。
Don't 用颜色单独表达审核、安全、成功或失败。
